item.title: About me
item.description:
Hello, I’m Kostas! I am an undergraduate Computer Engineering (CEID) student at the University of Patras.

You can reach me directly via the following contact details:

  • Email: kostaszoropoulos@gmail.com
  • Phone: +30 6988633078
